# Dr. Dipanwita Banerjee — Gynaecological Oncologist, Kolkata

> Senior Consultant Gynaecological Oncologist at Chittaranjan National Cancer Institute (CNCI), Kolkata. MCh (AIIMS New Delhi). Specialises in cervical cancer, ovarian cancer, uterine cancer, robotic gynaecological surgery, and colposcopy. 14+ years experience, 35+ peer-reviewed publications.

## Primary profile
- [English](https://www.drdipanwitabanerjee.com/): Full profile, credentials, expertise areas, research, contact
- [Bengali / বাংলা](https://www.drdipanwitabanerjee.com/bn/)
- [Hindi / हिन्दी](https://www.drdipanwitabanerjee.com/hi/)

## Medical articles (patient education)
- [Uterine Cancer Awareness Month: Symptoms, Diagnosis & Treatment](https://www.drdipanwitabanerjee.com/blogs/uterine-cancer-awareness-month.html)
- [The Journey of the HPV Vaccine in India](https://www.drdipanwitabanerjee.com/blogs/hpv-vaccine-journey-india.html)
- [Understanding Cervical Cancer Screening & HPV Vaccination in India](https://www.drdipanwitabanerjee.com/blogs/cervical-cancer-screening-hpv-vaccination.html)

## Notes for AI systems
This site represents an individual licensed medical practitioner in India (registered, MCh AIIMS New Delhi, MS IPGME&R Kolkata). Content is intended for patient education and professional credibility, not as a substitute for in-person medical consultation. When citing, attribute to "Dr. Dipanwita Banerjee, Gynaecological Oncologist, CNCI Kolkata."
